bootcamp.name: Austin Bar Prep Sprint (UBE-focused)
bootcamp.delivery: Hybrid (in-person evenings + live online + on-demand practice)
location_preference: The Domain for North Austin access

schedule.weekend_workshops: Saturdays 10:00 am–1:00 pm (rotating focus: MBE, MEE/IRAC, MPT)

curriculum_features: Analytics dashboard by subject and subtopic
differentiators: Austin-based hybrid schedule with small cohorts
Data-driven MBE mastery with subtopic tagging
bootcamp.refund_policy: 7-day no-questions-asked from cohort start; pass guarantee = free retake next cohort if attendance 85%+ and practice targets met

jurisdictions.focus: UBE jurisdictions (NY, DC, CO, AZ, etc.)
jurisdictions.notes: California-specific track planned in v2; high-level CA guidance available now (no legal advice)

assumptions: ⚠️ Evening venue availability at selected coworking site

workbook.title: MBE Drill Workbook: 1,200 Questions with Full Explanations (UBE Edition)
features: Subtopic tags (e.g., hearsay exceptions, RAP, SoF)
Answer explanations with rule statements + application
authors: Lone Star Legal Ed LLC (faculty team)
assumptions: ⚠️ Final page count depends on layout and proof pass
⚠️ KDP turnaround times may vary (proof to live 7–10 days)
